hooks.command: if [ -f /tmp/claude-code-edited ]; then if ! lsof -i :3000 -sTCP:LISTEN -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then rm /tmp/claude-code-edited; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"[Preview Required] Code was edited but no dev server is running. Install dependencies if needed, call preview_start, then follow <verification_workflow>.\"}"; else rm /tmp/claude-code-edited; fi; fi
